items.name: Emberwrath Staff
items.lore: Wrath of endless burning grudges
abilities: Flame Wave (cone AoE DoT)
Fireball (AoE burst)
Inferno Shield (reflect dmg)
Hellstorm (large AoE DoT)
Crimson Pyre (lifesteal burn AoE)
items.signatureAbility: Flame Nova (explode all burns)

items.name: Ember Heart
items.lore: Wrath of endless burning grudges
abilities: Flame Wave (cone AoE DoT)
Fireball (AoE burst)
Inferno Shield (reflect dmg)
Hellstorm (large AoE DoT)
Crimson Pyre (lifesteal burn AoE)
items.signatureAbility: Flame Nova (explode all burns)

items.name: Glacial Spire
items.lore: Spire of glacial eternal grudges
abilities: Ice Nova (AoE slow)
Frost Lance (single burst)
Glacial Shield (absorb dmg)
Blizzard Strike (channeled AoE slow dmg)
Crimson Ice (bleed + freeze)
items.signatureAbility: Absolute Zero (mass freeze)

items.name: Ice Warden
items.lore: Spire from iceblood rituals
abilities: Ice Nova
Frost Lance
Glacial Shield
Iceblood (lifesteal freeze)
Frost Ritual (HoT + chill)
items.signatureAbility: Iceblood Eruption (explode + heal)

items.name: Dawnspire
items.lore: Staff of dawning holy grudges
abilities: Divine Wave (AoE heal)
Sacred Shield (ally shield)
Smite (dmg purge)
Radiant Salvation (AoE heal cleanse)
Crimson Grace (heal lifesteal)
items.signatureAbility: Holy Beacon (ally empower)

items.name: Sacred Light
items.lore: Oathbreaker staff of sacred light
abilities: Divine Wave
Sacred Shield
Smite
Oathbreaker Light (purge + grace)
Sacred Chains (bind shield)
items.signatureAbility: Sacred Apocalypse (large purge AoE)

items.name: Stormwrath
items.lore: Staff of stormwrath grudges
abilities: Lightning Strike (AoE stun)
Chain Shock (multi bounce)
Storm Shield (reflect)
Thunder Tempest (AoE chain stun)
Crimson Bolt (lifesteal shock)
items.signatureAbility: Storm Call (rain lightning)

items.name: Thunder Spire
items.lore: Infused with thunder clan grudges
abilities: Lightning Strike
Chain Shock
Storm Shield
Thunder Surge (channeled line shock)
Thunder Wall (wall stun)
items.signatureAbility: Thunder Cataclysm (ultimate storm)

items.name: Sword Of The Storm
items.lore: Forged in the heart of an eternal tempest, this blade crackles with caged lightning. Each swing splits the air with thunderclaps that shatter the resolve of armies.
abilities: Tempest Fury (AoE lightning burst, 8m radius, stuns 1.5s)
Chain Lightning (bounces between 5 targets, +15% damage per bounce)
Thunder Guard (passive: 20% chance to shock melee attackers)
Stormcaller (summon a lightning pillar that strikes randomly for 10s)
Eye of the Storm (dash through enemies leaving a lightning trail)
items.signatureAbility: Wrath of the Tempest (massive AoE: call down 12 lightning bolts in a 15m area over 4s, each dealing 200% weapon damage)

items.name: Hellfire Blade
items.lore: Quenched in demon blood and sealed with infernal runes, this sword burns with an unquenchable flame that feeds on the souls of the fallen.
abilities: Hellfire Wave (frontal cone fire blast, 10m range)
Soul Immolation (ignite target, if they die while burning you heal 15% max HP)
Flame Dash (teleport 8m leaving a fire trail that burns for 6s)
Demon Rage (+40% attack speed, +20% fire damage for 10s, costs 5% HP/s)
items.signatureAbility: Inferno Incarnate (transform into a fire demon for 12s: +50% all stats, all attacks deal AoE fire, immune to CC)

items.name: Commander Sword
items.lore: Carried by the last general of the Grudge Crusade, this blade inspires unwavering loyalty in allies and dread in foes. Its edge has never dulled.
abilities: Battle Standard (plant a banner: +15% damage and +10% defense to allies in 12m for 20s)
Commander's Charge (charge forward 10m, allies in path gain +20% speed for 5s)
Unyielding Order (party-wide CC immunity for 4s)
Tactical Retreat (all allies gain +30% defense and +20% speed for 6s)
items.signatureAbility: General's Decree (for 15s: all allies deal +30% damage, take -20% damage, and regenerate 2% HP/s)

items.name: Emerald Sword
items.lore: Cut from a single world-crystal found in the roots of the Fabled Tree, this blade pulses with the heartbeat of the forest itself.
abilities: Thorn Lash (root target for 3s, deal nature damage over time)
Nature's Embrace (heal 25% max HP over 8s, cleanse all debuffs)
Crystal Barrage (fire 8 emerald shards in a cone, each dealing 40% weapon damage)
Overgrowth (summon entangling vines in 8m area, slow enemies 50% for 6s)
items.signatureAbility: Wrath of the Wilds (massive nature explosion: 20m AoE, enemies take 300% weapon damage and are rooted for 4s, allies heal 30% max HP)

items.name: Runed Great Sword
items.lore: Ancient runes carved by the first Grudge wardens pulse with power. Each kill adds a new rune, and the sword grows hungrier.
abilities: Rune Explosion (consume all Rune Stacks, deal 50% weapon damage per stack in 10m AoE)
Gravity Well (pull all enemies within 12m to your position)
Runic Shield (absorb damage equal to 5% max HP per Rune Stack for 8s)
Executioner's Sweep (360° slash, +100% damage vs enemies below 25% HP)
items.signatureAbility: Rune Apocalypse (at 10 stacks: unleash all runes as homing projectiles dealing 500% total weapon damage split across all enemies in 20m)

items.name: Demons Shard
items.lore: A fragment of a shattered demon lord's spine, reforged into a blade that whispers dark promises. It feeds on fear and grows stronger in darkness.
abilities: Soul Harvest (drain 8% max HP from target, heal yourself)
Nightmare (AoE fear: enemies flee for 3s, take 20% more damage while feared)
Shadow Step (teleport behind target, next attack crits automatically)
Dark Pact (sacrifice 20% current HP for +50% damage for 12s)
items.signatureAbility: Demon Lord's Wrath (transform the battlefield: 20m zone of darkness for 10s, you gain +60% damage, enemies are blinded and slowed 40%)

items.name: Shrouded Axe
items.lore: Wrapped in shadows that cling like living smoke, this axe was the weapon of the Legion's ghost executioner. Its victims never see it coming.
abilities: Smoke Bomb (vanish for 4s, next attack from stealth guaranteed crit)
Execution (instant kill enemies below 10% HP, player-characters take 500% damage instead)
Shadow Clone (create a decoy that taunts for 5s while you reposition)
Venomous Edge (coat axe in poison: attacks deal +25% damage as poison DoT for 6s)
items.signatureAbility: Ghost Executioner (enter permanent stealth for 8s, each attack from stealth deals +100% damage and doesn't break stealth)

items.name: Thors Hammer
items.lore: Not the god's own, but a hammer forged from the same celestial ore, struck by a thousand thunderbolts during its creation. Only the worthy can lift it.
abilities: Hammer Throw (hurl the hammer 20m, it returns like a boomerang hitting all in path)
Ground Slam (smash the ground: 12m AoE, enemies knocked airborne 2s)
Lightning Call (call down 5 lightning bolts on target area over 3s)
Mjolnir's Blessing (self-buff: +30% damage, +20% defense, lightning aura for 12s)
items.signatureAbility: Thundergod's Judgment (leap 15m into the air, slam down with cosmic force: 20m AoE, 400% weapon damage, all enemies stunned 3s)

items.name: Steel Maul
items.lore: Pure dwarven steel, no enchantments, no magic — just perfect engineering and devastating weight. The dwarves say it speaks for itself.
abilities: Shockwave (ground pound: 10m frontal cone, stun 2s)
Armor Break (reduce target defense by 40% for 10s)
Dwarven Fortitude (take -30% damage for 8s, reflect 15% melee damage)
Seismic Slam (3-hit combo: each hit wider AoE, third hit knocks back 8m)
items.signatureAbility: Earthquake (channel 3s: entire screen shakes, all enemies in 25m take 300% damage and are stunned 4s, terrain cracks open dealing DoT)

items.name: War Hammer
items.lore: Blessed by the last priest of the Crusade before the fall, this hammer glows with divine radiance and burns the undead on contact.
abilities: Consecrate (create holy ground: allies heal 3% HP/s, undead take damage, 10m, 12s)
Divine Shield (absorb next 3 attacks completely)
Judgment (single-target nuke: 250% weapon damage to undead, 150% to others)
Redemption (revive a fallen ally with 40% HP, 5min cooldown)
items.signatureAbility: Crusader's Light (massive holy nova: 15m AoE, heal all allies 40% max HP, damage all enemies 200%, undead take 400%)

items.name: Spear Of Destiny
items.lore: Legend says whoever wields this spear controls the fate of nations. It has pierced the hearts of kings and toppled empires.
abilities: Piercing Thrust (30m range, pierces through all enemies in a line)
Fate's Judgment (mark a target: they take +25% damage from all sources for 10s)
Destiny's Shield (become immune to the next lethal hit, 3min cooldown)
Vault Strike (pole-vault 12m, slam down for AoE)
items.signatureAbility: Manifest Destiny (for 15s: all attacks pierce through enemies, crit chance +30%, kills extend duration by 3s)

items.name: Royal Spear
items.lore: The ceremonial weapon of the Grudge royal guard, each gem in its shaft represents a kingdom sworn to the Grudge throne.
abilities: Shield Wall (create a barrier that blocks all projectiles for 5s)
Crown's Authority (taunt all enemies in 15m, gain +30% defense for 6s)
Royal Thrust (long-range lunge, knocks target back 8m)
King's Blessing (buff nearest 3 allies with +15% damage for 12s)
items.signatureAbility: Royal Decree (20m AoE: allies gain +25% all stats, enemies are slowed 50% and deal -20% damage for 10s)

items.name: Light Spear
items.lore: Woven from crystallized starlight by the Fabled elves, this spear weighs nothing and strikes with the brilliance of a falling star.
abilities: Radiant Barrage (5 rapid thrusts in 1s, each dealing 60% weapon damage)
Blinding Flash (blind all enemies in 10m for 3s)
Light Step (dash 15m, leave afterimages that deal 30% damage to enemies they pass through)
Starfall (throw spear skyward, it returns as 8 light spears in an area)
items.signatureAbility: Supernova (charge for 2s, release a massive light explosion: 25m AoE, 350% damage, blinds 5s, heals allies 20% max HP)

items.name: Frost Blade
items.lore: Carved from glacier ice that never melts, this blade freezes the blood of those it cuts. The cold it radiates can be felt from ten paces.
abilities: Ice Prison (freeze target solid for 3s, they take +30% damage when thawed)
Blizzard (summon a blizzard: 12m AoE, continuous frost damage + slow for 8s)
Glacial Armor (coat yourself in ice: +40% defense, reflects 10% melee damage as frost for 10s)
Shatter (deal 200% damage to frozen targets, shattering them sends ice shards to nearby enemies)
items.signatureAbility: Absolute Zero (everything in 15m freezes for 4s, then shatters for 250% weapon damage, terrain becomes icy reducing enemy movement for 20s)

items.name: Staff Of The Magi
items.lore: The pinnacle of arcane craftsmanship, wielded by the archmage who shattered the first Grudge seal. It amplifies magic beyond mortal limits.
abilities: Spell Steal (copy the last spell an enemy cast and use it yourself)
Arcane Barrage (fire 6 homing arcane bolts, each dealing 80% spell damage)
Mana Singularity (drain mana from all enemies in 10m, restore your mana)
Time Warp (slow time by 50% for enemies in 15m for 6s)
items.signatureAbility: Arcane Apotheosis (ascend for 10s: float above ground, all spells cost 0 mana, +50% spell damage, +30% cast speed)

items.name: Staff Of The Dead
items.lore: Fashioned from the spine of a lich king, this staff bridges the gap between life and death. The spirits of the slain answer its call.
abilities: Raise Dead (summon 3 skeleton warriors from corpses, last 30s)
Soul Drain (channel: drain HP from target, heal yourself, 5s)
Plague Cloud (AoE poison: 12m, enemies take 3% max HP/s for 8s)
Death Coil (projectile that heals undead allies or damages living enemies)
items.signatureAbility: Army of the Dead (raise 8 powerful undead warriors + 1 skeletal champion for 20s, all inheriting 50% of your stats)

items.name: Staff Of Power
items.lore: Raw magical energy given form. This staff doesn't channel spells — it IS a spell, barely contained, vibrating with unimaginable power.
abilities: Energy Beam (channel a continuous beam dealing 200% damage/s for 3s, drains mana)
Power Shield (absorb shield equal to 30% of your max mana)
Overcharge (next spell deals double damage but costs triple mana)
Mana Explosion (detonate 20% of your current mana as AoE damage, 1 mana = 2 damage)
items.signatureAbility: Retribution (discharge ALL remaining mana as a single blast: 1 mana = 5 damage, 30m range, unavoidable)

items.name: Tomb Of The Magi
items.lore: A living grimoire that writes itself. Pages appear and vanish as needed, containing every spell ever conceived and some that have yet to be imagined.
abilities: Page Turn (instantly reset cooldown of last used ability)
Forbidden Knowledge (learn the last spell an enemy used, usable once)
Arcane Library (for 10s, all your spells gain +1 target)
Author's Rewrite (undo the last 3 seconds of combat — reverse damage, positions, cooldowns)
items.signatureAbility: Omniscience (for 12s: you can cast any class skill from any class at +30% effectiveness, mana costs halved)

items.name: WindWalker Bow
items.lore: Strung with wind itself, arrows fired from this bow bend around obstacles and strike true. The wind carries the archer's will.
abilities: Gale Volley (fire 12 arrows into the air, they rain down on a 10m area)
Zephyr Dash (wind-dash 15m in any direction, fire 3 arrows during the dash)
Tornado Shot (fire an arrow that creates a tornado on impact, pulling enemies in for 5s)
Wind Walk (become one with the wind: +50% movement speed, invisible while moving, 8s)
items.signatureAbility: Storm of Arrows (ascend on wind, hover for 5s firing homing arrows at all enemies in 30m — 1 arrow per enemy per second, each dealing 100% weapon damage)

items.name: Spiked Club
items.lore: Crude but devastatingly effective. Torn from the hands of an orc warchief after a three-day duel, every spike is stained with the blood of champions.
abilities: Overhead Crush (single target, 200% damage, guaranteed stun 2s)
Berserker Rage (+30% damage, +20% attack speed, take +15% damage, 10s)
Spine Breaker (hit reduces target attack speed by 25% for 6s)
Primal Roar (AoE fear 3s, +10% damage per feared enemy for 6s)
items.signatureAbility: Warchief's Fury (enter a 12s frenzy: +50% attack speed, each hit applies a random debuff — bleed, stun, slow, or fear)

items.name: Verdant Wrath
items.lore: Staff of verdant wrathful growth
abilities: Thorn Burst (AoE dmg)
Healing Bloom (AoE HoT)
Nature's Shield (absorb)
Grove's Embrace (AoE HoT + root)
Crimson Roots (HoT bleed)
items.signatureAbility: Nature's Fury (spirit allies)

items.name: Thorn Grudge
items.lore: Infused with thorny clan grudges
abilities: Thorn Burst
Healing Bloom
Nature's Shield
Thorn Surge (channeled vine DoT)
Verdant Wall (wall thorns)
items.signatureAbility: Verdant Cataclysm (ultimate storm)

items.name: Wild Oathbreaker
items.lore: Oathbreaker staff of wild nature
abilities: Thorn Burst
Healing Bloom
Nature's Shield
Oathbreaker Growth (purge + growth)
Wild Chains (bind thorns)
items.signatureAbility: Wild Apocalypse (large purge AoE)
